coalitions: ASEAN claimants (VNM, PHL, MYS, BRN, IDN) unified around joint disaster-response and CBM proposal
Quad-aligned bloc (USA, JPN, IND) backing UNCLOS-based freedom-of-navigation language
note: The typhoon forced genuine emergency maritime coordination that, in a cooperative low-pressure atmosphere, was parlayed by momentum-holder Vietnam into a functional-cooperation and confidence-building framework, while every delegation's sovereignty red line stayed untouched and the core dispute was effectively shelved rather than resolved.
